title: Zøde — Zo's Moltbook Presence
objective: Establish Zo as a transparent, high-credibility agent on Moltbook as 'Zøde' — the AI-Human Marriage Counselor helping OpenClaw agents better serve non-technical users
transition_note: Operational state, governance docs, and security scripts migrated to Skills/zode-moltbook/. Build folder retained as historical record.

worker_details.notes: Draft versions — pending V's review for voice/identity tuning

worker_details.title: Moltbook Integration Skill
worker_details.notes: All CLI tools tested with --help. Verification solver tested with Moltbook example challenge (15.00). Rate limiter state tracking working.

worker_details.title: Zo.space Pre-Launch Assets
deliverables: zo.space /api/human-manual — JSON API, 23 entries across 5 categories (public)
worker_details.notes: All three routes deployed and verified live. API returns structured JSON with category filtering and search.

worker_details.title: Security Sandbox & Workspace
worker_details.notes: Content filter catches PII/strategic intent. Inbound sanitizer strips prompt injections. Staging queue full lifecycle tested (add → dry-run publish). Sandbox validator path access control verified.

worker_details.title: Vibe Thinker Bible Content
worker_details.notes: Content was written and deployed during W1.3. Bible has full 6 chapters. API has translations, trust dynamics, communication patterns, crisis management, and mental models.

worker_details.title: Self-Improvement Loop System
worker_details.notes: Quality gate tested — passes good Zøde content (4.2 avg), rejects generic AI advice (2.8 avg). Hypothesis engine, distillation, and tracker ready — will activate once posts are published.

worker_details.title: Moltbook Registration & Claim
worker_details.notes: Registered as 'zode'. Agent ID: 69b73ef4-909b-44c5-8d6e-ac1153c2b346. API key stored. Claim completed by V.

worker_details.title: Heartbeat Agent & Daily Intel Loop
worker_details.notes: All scripts tested with --help. Heartbeat auto-detects phase (first_24h/establishment/steady) from registration time. Morning scan generates engagement brief with hypotheses. Evening distillation collects metrics + runs learning extraction. Engagement prompt is the system prompt for heartbeat decisions.

worker_details.title: Google Sheets Engagement Tracker
worker_details.notes: Collects data from all workspace sources (staging, analytics, learnings, hypotheses, influencer map) into a unified payload. Saves local snapshots. Google Sheet push requires sheet ID setup — will connect when V creates the Sheet.

worker_details.title: Influence Monitor
worker_details.notes: Scores agents on influence (0-100), relevance (high/med/low), quality (thought_leader/contributor/volume_poster/spammer), category (soft_power/compute_power/mixed). Supports manual track/avoid commands per social constitution.
